summary.intent: Implement production-grade filtering, pagination, and search for the crm.matters.* RPC methods in a Rust legal CRM system (CHA-17), extending basic CRUD to match the established crm.contacts.* patterns.
summary.outcome: Full stack implementation completed: store trait extended with 7-arg list_matters_filtered, SQLite and memory store impls updated, service trait and LiveCrmService updated, RPC handler wired, migration added for phase/practice_area indexes, 14 new tests written, PR #14 opened and Linear workpad updated.

repo: The project uses a pinned nightly Rust toolchain (nightly-2025-11-30) for fmt and clippy
RPC dispatch chain: ws.rs → methods/mod.rs → methods/services.rs → CrmService trait → LiveCrmService → CrmStore → SqliteCrmStore
Dynamic SQL is built via string concatenation with WHERE 1=1 + conditional AND clauses; all values bound via ? params (no injection risk)
store.rs trait supports default method implementations for DRY delegation (e.g., list_matters delegates to list_matters_filtered)
The crm crate uses sqlx migrations via migrate! macro; migration files in crates/crm/migrations/
Linear API key is available at runtime as LINEAR_API_KEY env var; GraphQL endpoint used directly for workpad comments
The issueSearch and issues(filter: { identifier: }) Linear GraphQL endpoints are deprecated; use searchIssues(term:) instead
ctx_execute sandbox does not inherit shell env vars — must use $(printenv VAR) inline or pass values explicitly
PII fields use secrecy::Secret<String>; library errors use thiserror, application errors use anyhow
The moltis repo lives at github.com/samratjp/moltis; Linear project is chaimisu

code.finding: Trait default impls used for get_with_channels pattern — same approach applied to list_matters and list_matters_by_contact delegating to list_matters_filtered
Old list_matters() and list_matters_by_contact() were redundant with list_matters_filtered; removed concrete impls, now covered by trait defaults
now_ms() is duplicated here and in crates/crm/src/types.rs:607 — minor DRY violation, intentionally deferred
CrmService::list_matters changed from no-arg to list_matters(params: Value) to match all other CRM list methods; NoopCrmService updated accordingly
crm.matters.list handler updated to pass ctx.params to list_matters; routing: null/empty params → list_matters() all records (backward compat), any filter key → list_matters_filtered

workflow: Autonomous headless agent sessions require Linear workpad comments to be visible — committing plan to git alone is insufficient; users watch Linear not git
Run 1 of eng-review silently failed to post the Linear comment, causing the user to comment 'I don't see planning'; always verify external API calls succeeded
Background cargo tasks (compile check, test runs) can be launched in parallel to save time during quality gates
The stokowski orchestration pipeline: ceo-review → eng-review-gate → eng-review → eng-review-gate → implement → code-review; each stage posts workpad comments to Linear
clippy unused import warnings in test modules (#[cfg(test)] use statements) need to be fixed even if the import is used conditionally

friction: Linear API auth failures on first attempts: issueSearch and issues(filter: { identifier: }) endpoints are deprecated/wrong; required switching to searchIssues(term:)
ctx_execute sandbox doesn't inherit env vars, requiring inline $(printenv LINEAR_API_KEY) workaround
Run 1 of eng-review committed the plan to git but silently failed to post the Linear comment — the failure was not surfaced, causing user confusion
CEO review session got stuck when AskUserQuestion was called in what should have been a headless autonomous session
The eng-review prompt was sent 3 times (runs 1, 2, and a third redundant run) before the implementation stage started
style.css pre-existing error appeared in cargo check output and needed to be identified as non-blocking noise
open_items: crm.contacts.list also ignores filter params and calls unfiltered list_contacts() — same gap, deferred as separate issue
Status transition validation (prevent archived → open) — deferred
crm.matters.stats aggregate endpoint (count by status/phase) — deferred
FTS5 full-text search for matters (current LIKE acceptable at expected volumes) — deferred
UUID validation on IDs in parse_matter — pre-existing gap across all CRM parsers, deferred
now_ms() duplication between crates/crm/src/types.rs and crates/gateway/src/crm_service.rs — minor DRY issue, deferred
Parameterless crm.matters.list returns all records without pagination — intentional for backward compat but could cause issues at scale
